user_message: I need you to process this email thread from Northwind Traders. There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: escalation triage Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-03-18
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on escalation triage from our last session.

[00:06:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:11:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:13:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:17:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:22:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:27:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

handoffs.condition: solution sketch needed from discovery signals

required_artifacts: BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF43-R trap (Opportunity record schema doesn't natively hold evidence_quotes -- forces awkwar); produces complete BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes, opportunity proposal with stage/value/close-date, confi
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF43-R failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF43-R failure mode (Opportunity record schema doesn't natively hold evidence_quotes -- forces awkwar)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF43-R -- Opportunity record schema doesn't natively hold evidence_quotes -- forces awkwar
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
